case_title: DANIEL H KERR VS. POIRAMGIT SINGH ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-04-2015 CONTINUED TO APR-15-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KERR, DANIEL H AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, POIRAMGIT NATIONAL CAB COMPANY, INC., DBA NATIONAL VETERANS CAB COMPANY VETERANS CAB CORP., DBA NATIONAL VETERANS CAB COMPANY DOES 1 TO 100 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-04-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-01-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-09-2015

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-15-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KERR, DANIEL H
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KERR, DANIEL H
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-02-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF KERR, DANIEL H
